positive: A stylized, symmetrical central composition featuring abstract woodland creatures and botanical elements forming a cohesive pattern. Include stylized fox silhouettes weaving through large, detailed monstera leaves and delicate wildflower clusters. Use a deep emerald green and sapphire blue color palette accented by burnt orange and ivory. The style should be intricate linework illustration, highly decorative, with clean, bold black outlines and negative space highlighting the silhouettes. Optimized for seamless repeating tile pattern, high contrast, perfect for apparel print, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, deformed, artifacts, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, monochrome
